2025-26 UC Santa Barbara Gauchos Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 18-14 (11-9, 6th in Big West MBB)

Coach: Joe Pasternack

PS/G: 77.6 (133rd of 365)

PA/G: 72.8 (142nd of 365)

SRS: 0.83 (140th of 365)

SOS: -2.13 (184th of 365)

ORtg: 113.2 (98th of 365)

DRtg: 106.1 (157th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +150000
